pricing.title: Licensing
pricing.subtitle: Every photo is available to download instantly via PayPal. All prices in EUR.
pricing.smallUse: Perfect for digital use, social media, and small prints up to A4.
pricing.fullUse: Maximum detail for large-format printing, framing, and archival use.
pricing.businessDesc: Using a photo for advertising, editorial, or any commercial purpose? Get in touch and I'll put together a custom quote.
pricing.step1Desc: Browse the portfolio and open any image you love.
pricing.step2Desc: Pick Small (€19) or Full Resolution (€49) and pay securely via PayPal.
pricing.step3Desc: A download link lands in your inbox within minutes — valid for 14 days.
pricing.note: Personal use only. The photographer retains full copyright. A license grants usage rights, not ownership.
